title: Ore Creeper
description: Add Creepers that when it explodes they transform the surroundings into Ores!
body:
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/735938861636780042?style=flat-square&logo=discord&label=Discord&color=5865F2)](https://discord.com/invite/2wMZKZ7B6E) • [![Ko-fi](https://img.shields.io/badge/Support-Ko--fi-F16061?style=flat-square&logo=ko-fi&logoColor=white)](https://ko-fi.com/cozary) • [![Issues](https://img.shields.io/github/issues/Cozary/Ore-Creeper?style=flat-square&logo=github&logoColor=white&color=364763)](https://github.com/Cozary/Ore-Creeper/issues) • [![Crowdin](https://badges.crowdin.net/ore-creeper/localized.svg)](https://crowdin.com/project/ore-creeper)

Description

This mod adds creepers based on the Ores that the game includes. When exploring you will be able to find them and when they explode the surrounding blocks they will become ores according to the type of Creeper! Ore Tnt transforms normal Creepers into Ore Creepers!

Creepers do not cause any damage, although if you want to kill them they will also drop some Loot. There is a config file in which you can modify the spawn rate, as well as the size of the explosion.

 

 

Resource Pack Compatibilities

  • Squishy's Reanimated Mobs
